Book Your Session

Let's capture
your dream day

I'd love to hear about your wedding plans! Fill out the form below and I'll get back to you within 48 hours.

Based In

Glasgow, Scotland

Available for weddings across Scotland & beyond

Response time: I typically respond within 24-48 hours. Can't wait to hear about your big day!

Frequently asked questions

I capture candid, behind-the-scenes moments of your wedding day and deliver them to you within 24-48 hours. I complement your photographer and videographer – never replacing them – by focusing on the spontaneous, informal moments they might miss while doing formal shots.
All footage will be sent to you within 24-48 hours of your wedding day! You'll have content to share and relive while the day is still fresh in your mind.
You'll receive a full gallery of raw photos and videos capturing all the best moments of your day. Plus, edited videos/reels will be discussed and arranged according to your wishes – perfect for sharing on social media!
Yes! While I'm based in Glasgow, I'm happy to travel across Scotland and beyond. Travel costs may apply depending on the location – just get in touch and we can discuss.
Absolutely! Bespoke packages are available on request and can be tailored to your specific needs. Every wedding is different, so let's chat about what works best for you.
ʜᴀᴘᴘɪʟʏ ᴇᴠᴇʀᴄᴀᴘᴛᴜʀᴇᴅ

Kerry Percy · Wedding content creator based in Glasgow, Scotland.
